channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Riyadh Falcons Give OpTic Texas First Match Loss Since February 1
item.content:encoded:
OpTic Texas’s monumental win streak was halted this weekend as the Riyadh Falcons showed up to the Major II qualifiers in hot form. In a series that wasn’t all that close, the Falcons overcame OpTic with a 3-1 scoreline, defeating the team and putting an end to a record-breaking win streak attempt that sat at 9-0 before the loss.

Many predicted that OpTic Texas would fly through the qualifying stage for the DreamHack Birmingham Major with a perfect record, and that was almost the case. In last night’s match against Toronto KOI, OpTic regained and secured another 3-0 win, but that Riyadh Falcons loss is sure to sting as we head to the United Kingdom.

OpTic Texas Secures Top Seed for UK Major

OpTic Texas has managed to put up one hell of a fight since dropping out of the Dallas Major on home turf on February 1. The team fell at the last post against Paris Gentle Mates, failing to snatch the trophy at the first Major of the season, but the upcoming Major II tournament represents one hell of a chance at redemption.

The United Kingdom Major, which will take place at DreamHack, is the first time in almost six years that the Call of Duty League has taken place in the region. It has been absent from the UK for the longest time, and fans are hungry for this event. The coincidence with DreamHack is a huge bonus, as fans will be able to explore the wider event while also enjoying the CDL.

But back to OpTic Texas.

Last year, the team went on a landmark run, securing the Call of Duty League Championship a year after winning it on home turf. The victory came in Canada, just outside Toronto, and it was followed up swiftly with a win at the Esports World Cup. It was, except for a massive blip at the start of the year, one of the best seasons for a team in Call of Duty esports history.

There’s some solid competition shaping up for OpTic Texas at the UK Major, though. To open the event, OpTic Texas will clash with either KOI or Vancouver Surge, and a win there will mean facing either G2 Minnesota or Riyadh Falcons. Both teams have the potential to throw OpTic Texas into the loser’s run in Birmingham.

What do you think will happen at Major II? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the latest from LoL First Stand

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/riyadh-falcons-first-loss-optic-texas/

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today (#1016)—Answers for Monday, March 23
item.content:encoded:
It’s an entirely new week, which means you’ve got seven fresh opportunities to push that NYT Connections streak even further! Today, you’ve got a doozy of a challenge that had me stumped for a hot minute, but now that I’ve beaten the puzzle, I’ve got the NYT Connections hints and solutions you need to get it done!

Scroll down for today’s NYT Connections answers and tips, so you can get this puzzle done quickly and get on with your day.

How to Play NYT Connections

In June 2023, NYT Connections emerged as yet another game in the ever-growing lineup of the New York Times titles. This title soared immediately, and it’s easy to see why. As a free-to-play, accessible New York Times game, NYT Connections is available worldwide and can be played on desktop devices or in a mobile app.

But how do you play NYT Connections?

The NYT team will provide you with a grid of 16 words once a day. The only task left up to you is to sort those words into four groups of four by finding their commonalities. Every NYT Connections puzzle has just one solution, and some words can have double meanings, so it can sometimes be tricky to figure out the answers.

It’s also important to stress that the words are color-coded: yellow, blue, green, and purple. That’s in order of difficulty, from least to most.

What’s critical here is that you get four guesses every day, and if you use those, your NYT Connections answers for today will be out of reach, as it’ll be game over.

Today’s NYT Connections Hints (March 23)

Here are the words from today’s NYT Connections puzzle:

  • JUNGLE GYM
  • STAND-UP
  • LIGHT BULB
  • BROCCOLI RABE
  • OLIVE OIL
  • WHEEL
  • OPEN MIC
  • MARY
  • BRAIN STEW
  • MOCKTAIL
  • PRINTING PRESS
  • HONEST
  • MORAL
  • SLICED BREAD
  • DECENT
  • VIRGO

And here are the hints I can offer for today’s NYT Connections:

  • Yellow – You’d associate these words with having fine principles
  • Green – These words are names for some of the most important inventions of all time
  • Blue – Things you could otherwise name ‘virgin’
  • Purple – Words that end with things that sound like men’s names

Here’s the final warning before we get to the NYT Connections answers for today, March 23:

Are you sure you want to scroll further?

Very well!

NYT Connections Answers Explained for Today, March 23 (#1016)

If you want to jump straight to the answers for today’s NYT Connections puzzle, I’ve got you covered:

  • Yellow – DECENT, HONEST, MORAL, STAND-UP
  • Green – LIGHT BULB, PRINTING PRESS, SLICED BREAD, WHEEL
  • Blue – MARY, MOCKTAIL, OLIVE OIL, VIRGO
  • Purple – BRAIN STEW, BROCCOLI RABE, JUNGLE GYM, OPEN MIC

When Does NYT Connections Reset?

That’s today’s puzzle, but if you want the next one, the game resets daily at midnight local time (that’s your local time). You’ll have 24 hours to complete the puzzle when midnight ticks over in your timezone.

How did you do? Did you get a perfect run? Let me know what your streak looks like on the Insider Gaming Discord server

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-connections-hints-solutions-march-23-1016/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: HBO’s ‘The Last of Us’ Casts Yara and Lev for Season 3
item.content:encoded:
HBO’s The Last of Us series has cast its Yara and Lev. Per Deadline, the sibling pair from the second Last of Us game will be played by Michelle Mao and Kyriana Kratter, respectively.

Kyriana Kratter plays Lev, a transgender teenager, and Michelle Mao plays their sister, Yara. Both were born into the Seraphite cult. Love would be banished for his gender identity, and Yara would eventually aid in his escape. Lev is also the partner of Abby Anderson, played in the series by Kaitlyn Dever.

Michelle Mao is known for her work in Bridgerton. Kyrianna Kratter, on the other hand, is known for roles in Disney’s Bunk’d and Star Wars: Skeleton Crew.

The Last of Us Season 3 May Be Its Final Season

Season 3 of HBO’s series is expected to premiere in 2027, and it might be the show’s final season. Season 2 wrapped up in 2025, but not before setting the stage for a story told from the perspective of the previously mentioned Abby Anderson.

One reason season 3 is expected to be the final installment of the video game adaptation is that, once this story unfolds, it will mark the end of the source material. The last game in the Last of Us series was released in 2020.

It was heavily hinted earlier this year that this show is nearing its end with the upcoming season. Learn more about that here. The showrunner of Last of Us is currently working on a Baldur’s Gate series. Learn more about that here.

How do you feel about the casting choice for Yara and Lev? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Resident Evil Producer Comments on Franchise’s 30th Anniversary
item.content:encoded:
Jun Takeuchi, the executive producer of the Resident Evil series, has commented on the franchise’s 30th Anniversary. March 22, 1996, saw the launch of the first Resident Evil game. The series is also known as Biohazard in Japan.

Currently, the successful horror franchise is breaking records with its latest release, Resident Evil Requiem, which has become the fastest-selling game in the franchise.

Jun Takeuchi’s Message to Resident Evil Fans Worldwide

Jun Takeuchi, via Capcom‘s European page on Twitter, extended a message of gratitude towards RE’s dedicated fan base. In his message, he noted that Requiem has now reached over 6 million players worldwide. Also, he promised the team will continue to bring wonderful experiences to gamers in the future.

“To our beloved fans of the Resident Evil series, Today marks the 30th anniversary of Resident Evil. We want to extend our heartfelt gratitude to all the fans who have supported us along the way since the release of our first game on March 2241, 1996.

“Last month, we released Resident Evil Requiem. With the return to Raccoon City, the place where it all began, we combined the two hearts of the series—horror and action—and packed them both into one title. And now, Requiem has reached over six million players around the world. Thank you all so much.

“Our team will continue to work hard to bring all of you even more wonderful experiences in the future—and it would be an honor if you continued along with us on that journey.
Thank you again for your support.”

Learn more about the success of Requiem at this link. For more future Resi games, check out the latest news on the remake of Code Veronica.

What’s your favorite Resident Evil game? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

item.title: Peni Parker Confirmed for Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls
item.content:encoded:
Peni Parker has been revealed as a playable character in the upcoming fighting game, Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls. Her inclusion was revealed in a trailer for The Amazing Guardians. This team is comprised of Spider-Man, Ms. Marvel, Star-Lord, and the aforementioned young Parker.

The official trailer was released during the Arc World Tour 2025–2026 Finals in Korea. An official PlayStation blog, written by game producer Takeshi Yamanaka, teases that players will learn more about how this team comes together by playing Episode Mode.

More Details on New Additions to Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls

The PlayStation blog also highlights the “Promoter,” another new character featured in the trailer. Her real name is revealed to be Xirena Awhina, and she’s an Elder of the Universe. It is said that she travels the galaxy organizing massive entertainment events, such as the high-stakes tournament that unfolds throughout the game’s story mode. Further details will be revealed soon.

Also, they’ve announced that the latest build of the game features Automatic Team Name Generation. The game will select characters and create a fun team name that references each character’s lore.

“The name appears on screen and is even announced by a ring announcer. Try out different combinations to discover cool, surprising, or just plain fun team names.”

The game is slated for release on August 6. It will be playable on PlayStation 5 and PC. Insider Gaming will continue to report the latest updates on the game as the release date nears.

Are you looking forward to playing this game? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Available on iOS & Android
